---
name: Change request
about: Request a mobile implementation, refactor, or release-process change
title: '[Change] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested change.

## Why this is needed

Explain the problem, constraint, or opportunity.

## Scope

- [ ] Mobile runtime behavior
- [ ] Architecture boundary
- [ ] CI or mobile validation gate
- [ ] Release process or platform constraints
- [ ] Documentation or contracts

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Architecture impact is explicit
- [ ] Documentation updates in English are identified
- [ ] Validation expectations are identified
- [ ] Platform-specific release implications are identified

## Notes

Add device, platform, dependency, or follow-up details here.
